package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for cross_repository_write_flow_without_shared_uow_boundary: Service methods coordinating several repositories with no explicit shared transaction or consistency boundary.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule020NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule020NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule020NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario020Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule020NegativeService, input Rule020NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
